caption: A man with a tall, grey, pointed wig and glasses is seated in a studio, wearing a white shirt, a red bow tie, and beige suspenders. He wears black headphones and is positioned in front of a professional microphone. The background is a wall filled with framed photographs and clothing items, including shirts labeled "LEE". On-screen logos appear on both sides of the man, featuring the text "BOSS TALK JOY" and "PODCAST". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, though his facial expression shifts. In the initial frames, he is looking forward and speaking. As the sequence progresses, he closes his eyes and tilts his head slightly downward in a pensive or tired manner. The overall setting remains static, with no movement of the equipment or the background elements.
